recipe.title: Smash burger
recipe.description: Need to rustle up a burger in under 15 minutes? Try Jamie's super-quick smash-&-go method, which maximises flavour by getting loads of gnarly caramelisation.

steps.descr: Peel the onion, very finely slice into rounds, then...
steps.instructions: Peel the onion, very finely slice into rounds, then break into rings and cook in a large non-stick frying pan with 1 tablespoon of olive oil for a few minutes, stirring regularly, then push to one side of the pan.

on_enter.say: Peel the onion, very finely slice into rounds, then break into rings and cook in a large non-stick frying pan with 1 tablespoon of olive oil for a few minutes, stirring regularly, then push to one side of the pan.

steps.descr: Squash the minced meat into a rough patty about ½cm...
steps.instructions: Squash the minced meat into a rough patty about ½cm thick and a bit bigger than your bun and place in the pan. Season with black pepper and the Cajun seasoning, then move the onion rings on top and use a fish slice to really smash the onions into the meat.

on_enter.say: Squash the minced meat into a rough patty about ½cm thick and a bit bigger than your bun and place in the pan. Season with black pepper and the Cajun seasoning, then move the onion rings on top and use a fish slice to really smash the onions into the meat.

steps.descr: Cook for 2 minutes on each side, or until gnarly and...
steps.instructions: Cook for 2 minutes on each side, or until gnarly and cooked through, toasting the halved bun alongside for a minute.

on_enter.say: Cook for 2 minutes on each side, or until gnarly and cooked through, toasting the halved bun alongside for a minute.

steps.descr: Spread the bun base with ketchup, sit the burger on top,...
steps.instructions: Spread the bun base with ketchup, sit the burger on top, slice and layer over 1 gherkin, squeeze over mustard to your liking, and pop the lid on.

on_enter.say: Spread the bun base with ketchup, sit the burger on top, slice and layer over 1 gherkin, squeeze over mustard to your liking, and pop the lid on.

steps.descr: Slice the tomato and remaining gherkin to serve on the...
steps.instructions: Slice the tomato and remaining gherkin to serve on the side with the salad leaves, or stuff it all into your bun, the choice is yours.

on_enter.say: Slice the tomato and remaining gherkin to serve on the side with the salad leaves, or stuff it all into your bun, the choice is yours.
